implications: Geometry branch becomes conditional rather than action-derived.
statement: If alpha-anchored a cannot be derived from the internal action, BHSM geometry weakens.
title: Canonical Geometry Failure

implications: Flavor hierarchy branch weakens or must be revised.
statement: If Omega_f cannot be derived from the twisted Dirac/bundle action, mass hierarchy predictions remain unsupported.
title: Mode-Selection Failure

implications: Quark flavor mapping is constrained by common-scale running comparisons.
statement: If scheme-consistent quark ratios disagree beyond fixed tolerance bands, BHSM flavor mapping fails or must be revised.
title: Common-Scale Quark Failure

implications: CKM internal-rule screen must survive frozen tolerance bands.
statement: If canonical BHSM V_us, V_cb, V_ub, delta, and J fail outside fixed tolerances, BHSM flavor mapping is falsified or constrained.
title: CKM Failure

implications: PMNS rows are effective-extension screens, not minimal-SM outputs.
statement: If neutrino ordering, octant, or phase decisively contradict BHSM effective-extension outputs, the neutrino branch fails.
title: PMNS Effective Failure

implications: Proxy H_T success must be replaced by the full spectrum.
statement: If the full twisted Dirac/H_T spectrum produces extra light states below 4 pi^2 v, the SM-equivalent BHSM mapping fails.
title: H_T Gap Failure

implications: Scalar/topographic scaffold must be proven in the full action.
statement: If unscreened light scalar/topographic modes remain, BHSM fails as a Standard-Model-equivalent low-energy theory.
title: Scalar Decoupling Failure

implications: One-loop/electroweak matching screen must survive higher-order matching.
statement: If higher-loop/threshold RG matching moves coupling agreement away from the electroweak scale beyond tolerance, the coupling branch weakens.
title: RG Matching Failure

implications: Frozen branches are invalidated by residual-driven retuning.
statement: Any post-freeze adjustment of a, S, modes, or Z_virt based on residuals invalidates the v1.0 prediction set.
title: No-Retuning Failure
